Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to analyze a POWL process model for an insurance claim handling process identify anomalies generate hypotheses for their existence and propose SQL queries to verify these hypotheses using a provided PostgreSQL schema

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Identify anomalies in the POWL model Loop between E Evaluate and P Approve OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children E P This means E and P can happen repeatedly which might be an anomaly if claims should not be evaluated and approved multiple times XOR between N Notify and skip OperatorPOWL operator Operator XOR children N skip Allows skipping customer notification Partial order anomalies root order add edge A C Allows closing the claim directly after assigning the adjuster bypassing evaluation approval and notification

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Generate hypotheses Loop Business rule change requiring reevaluation after rejection or conditional approval but poorly modeled as an infinite loop or applied to all claims instead of rejections XOR skip Miscommunication or technical limitation causing notifications to be optional Perhaps intended for internal only claims Premature closure Technical error in workflow system allowing concurrent tasks or inadequate constraints in the modeling tool

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Propose SQL queries Find claims closed without evaluation approval Locate claims approved multiple times Check if customer notification is frequently skipped

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Query 1 Claims closed without evaluation or approval We need to find claim id where the last activity is C but E or P does not exist for that claim Wait the prompt says Identify claims that were closed without a proper evaluation or approval event I can do without E OR without P

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Query 2 Locate claims that were approved multiple times

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Query 3 Check if customer notification steps are frequently skipped in practice Find claims that have been closed or approved but have no N event Also count the percentage

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Also premature closure closed before Evaluate Approve Notify

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets organize the response clearly based on the prompts instructions
